steps.title: Identify the structures
steps.content: Two independent clauses are joined at the blank: the quotation ending "...idealistic direction" and in 1909, for instance, judges recognized Selma Ottilia Lovisa Lagerlöf.... Both are complete clauses.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
Choice A uses direction"; — the semicolon after the closing quotation mark correctly joins the two independent clauses.

Choice
  • B uses only a comma (comma splice)
  • C lacks any punctuation between the clauses (run-on)
  • D adds an unnecessary and, breaking the structure


That matches choice A — A is correct.
